labels: workstream:governance, type:governance

## Surface
- Surface name:
- Current status: `experimental` / `beta`
- Proposed status: `beta` / `supported`
- Target release: (e.g. `v1.1.0`)

## Criteria Evidence
- [ ] RFC/spec exists and reflects current implementation
- [ ] Canonical implementation is stable (no known breaking changes planned)
- [ ] Selector contract documented in `anatomy.contract.mjs` and `capabilities.contract.mjs`
- [ ] Tests cover selector/behavior baseline
- [ ] A11y expectations are documented in the component doc
- [ ] Playground/docs usage examples exist
- [ ] Release/migration impact reviewed (no breaking change for existing users)

Reference criteria:
- `docs/release/experimental-to-supported-criteria.md`
- `docs/release/what-is-stable-in-v1.md`

## Evidence Links
- RFC/spec:
- Implementation:
- Tests:
- A11y docs:
- Usage examples:
- Release/migration notes:

## Risks / Open Questions

## Decision Proposal
- [ ] Approve promotion
- [ ] Defer promotion
